title: Election Results Plugin Configuration
description: Scrolling ticker of important races + full-screen interrupt when a race is newly called. Filterable to your state. NYT baseline provider with an optional California SoS county/city rollup.

enabled.description: Enable or disable the election results plugin

display_duration.title: Ticker Duration (seconds)
display_duration.description: How long the scrolling ticker shows per rotation. Dynamic duration may extend this to fit all races.

update_interval.title: Data Update Interval (seconds)
update_interval.description: How often to poll the election feeds. On election night use 30-60s; off-night the feeds are static so a higher value is fine.

state.title: Your State
state.description: 2-letter state code (e.g. CA, WA). Used to filter races and to build the NYT per-state feed URL.

hide_called_after_seconds.title: Hide Called Races After (seconds)
hide_called_after_seconds.description: Drop a called race from the ticker this long after it was called, even while other races are still uncalled. This drains the ticker as results settle. Default 24h.

override.title: Manual Override
override.description: Force the plugin on without waiting for the built-in calendar. Use to demo, or to point at a specific election feed.

active.description: Treat today as an election day (skips the calendar/window check). Combine with State + Election Date to control what is shown.

state.description: 2-letter state for the override (defaults to Your State).

election_date.title: Election Date (YYYY-MM-DD)
election_date.description: The election feed to show. Defaults to today when Active is on.

feed_filename.description: Exact NYT results filename when the slug is non-standard (e.g. a special: results-georgia-special-senate.json). Built under the election date.

feed_url.description: Full URL of a specific results JSON to show. Bypasses date/state URL building entirely.

trail_days.description: How many days after the election day to keep showing results.

calendar_events.title: Extra Scheduled Elections
calendar_events.description: Add elections the built-in calendar doesn't know (e.g. your state's primary date, or a special). Each must be predictable enough to build a feed URL: primary/general use the standard slug; a special needs feed_filename.

feed_filename.description: Required for specials: exact NYT results filename.

only_my_state.title: Only My State
only_my_state.description: Keep national races (President) plus every race in your state (statewide + that state's U.S. House districts). Turn off to show all fetched races.

local_races.title: Show Local Races (where available)
local_races.description: Where your state has an authoritative results source, use it for granular/local results on top of the national baseline. Auto-engages by state (currently California); no effect for states not yet supported.

race_types.title: Race Types
race_types.description: Which office types to show. Leave as-is for the standard set; downballot offices are excluded by default.

live_priority.title: Live Priority (Interrupt)
live_priority.description: Allow this plugin to take over the screen when a race is newly called, the same way live sports preempt the rotation.

enabled.description: Show a full-screen card when a race is newly called.

duration_seconds.description: How long each newly-called card holds the screen.

my_state_only.description: Only interrupt for races that pass the state filter.

max_age_seconds.description: Drop a queued call if it has waited longer than this without being shown (avoids stale interrupts).

enabled.description: Use the NYT static results feed (national + all states).

election_date.title: Election Date (YYYY-MM-DD)
election_date.description: Drives the feed URL, e.g. results-{state}-primary.json under this date.

election_type.title: Election Type
election_type.description: Primary feeds are per-state (results-{state}-primary.json); general feeds use results-{state}.json.

ca_sos.title: California local results (advanced options)
ca_sos.description: Auto-engaged for California when 'Show Local Races' is on. These knobs only fine-tune the CA Secretary of State rollup.

base_url.description: California SoS returns API base URL.

county.title: County Slug
county.description: Optional county slug (e.g. los-angeles) for a county-level rollup. Empty = statewide totals.

city.title: City
city.description: Optional convenience: a major CA city, mapped to its county for the rollup. Ignored if County is set.

include_house.description: Also fetch all CA U.S. House district results from the SoS.

override_nyt_votes.description: Use the SoS authoritative vote totals for CA races (NYT still drives calls and importance).

called_threshold.description: Reporting % at which a CA-SoS race is treated as called (SoS has no winner flag).

scroll_speed.title: Scroll Speed
scroll_speed.description: Ticker scroll speed (pixels per frame in frame-based mode).

scroll_delay.title: Scroll Delay (seconds)
scroll_delay.description: Delay between scroll steps; lower is faster. ~0.03 reads comfortably; 0.01 is fast.
